productDisplayName: Puma Men Schon Black & Blue Polo T-shirt
description: Black and blue polo T-shirt, made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, buttoned placket, jumping cat appliquéd on the left chest and a vented German brand puma specialises in minimalism and simplicity. This T-shirt from puma is the kind you cant have enough of. This piece's crush-worthy colour and stylish cut make it an off-duty must have. Pair this piece with fitted denims and bright canvas shoes.
